message:
fix: correct mobile sidebar z-index stacking so sidebar renders above backdrop (#9764)

The mobile sidebar backdrop used z-overlay (300) while the sidebar itself
used z-sidebar (150), causing the backdrop to cover the sidebar content.
This made the entire UI appear faded and prevented interaction with
dashboard navigation links. On mobile, the sidebar now uses z-modal (400)
so it renders above the backdrop overlay.

Fixes #9758

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
